text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! That shaky bartender thing is always so
dang cool to watch!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. Might I then demonstrate it for you
with a mockery of bacchanal delights?

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
What mocktail would suit your tastes, though?
Let's think... an Alice, perhaps? The sweetness
makes it easy on the tongue.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Alice like... Alice in Wonderland? No way! I'm way
too cool for some kiddy fairytale drink!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not that I don't want a drink! Just... not some
cutesy little sugar bomb, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'd rather have something cool! Somethin' sharp
with a real kick to it!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
I see... in the mood for something dry, then? If
you're certain, I could whip up a virgin mojito...
But I must warn you—

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... A real sip of adulthood can be bitter. Are
you sure you're ready for my style?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You mean... Am I mature enough to handle it?
...You bet I am! I've totally got what it takes to
drink the grown-up stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll make it dry enough to drain Oceanus!
Ahaha! How entertaining you are, my young
Vodka!
